commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh The great God that formed all things gives the fool his hire, and the transgressor his wages. Anger, and prevent lawsuits. Hebrew is variously read and translated. (Calmet) Protestants, "the great God, that formed all things, both rewardeth the fool and rewardeth the transgressors. "Marginal note, "a great man giveth all, and he hireth the fool "Septuagint, "all the flesh of fools is exposed to many storms, for their excess is punished.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
